---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Latest CV PDF, regenerated weekly with live citation counts."
date-modified: last-modified
---

The current academic CV lives at:
[loevlie.github.io/cv/loevlie-cv-latest.pdf](https://loevlie.github.io/cv/loevlie-cv-latest.pdf)

A short industry CV (two-column, denser) lives at:
[loevlie.github.io/cv/loevlie-cv-industry-latest.pdf](https://loevlie.github.io/cv/loevlie-cv-industry-latest.pdf)
*(coming soon — currently builds in the same repo)*

::: {.column-page}
<embed src="https://loevlie.github.io/cv/loevlie-cv-latest.pdf#view=FitH"
       type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="800px">
:::

## Source

Source LaTeX is in [github.com/loevlie/cv](https://github.com/loevlie/cv).
The CV is generated from `main.tex` + `publications.bib` via
`biblatex+biblatex-publist`, with `hyperxmp` for Adobe Bridge / Google
Scholar / ATS metadata, `bookmark` for navigable Acrobat outline, and
`xurl` for clean URL line-breaking.

Citation counts are refreshed weekly by a GitHub Action that queries
Semantic Scholar (with OpenAlex fallback) — see
[`scripts/fetch_citations.py`](https://github.com/loevlie/cv/blob/main/scripts/fetch_citations.py).
